query: SELECT YEAR(dataFaturado) as ano, MONTH(dataFaturado) as mes, COUNT(*) as total FROM contasTasy GROUP BY YEAR(dataFaturado), MONTH(dataFaturado) ORDER BY ano DESC, mes DESC LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2xKWvZvidGuv3Qt.root --database 98MRdVE9Uf2ZRMz25bPSye --execute SELECT YEAR(dataFaturado) as ano, MONTH(dataFaturado) as mes, COUNT(*) as total FROM contasTasy GROUP BY YEAR(dataFaturado), MONTH(dataFaturado) ORDER BY ano DESC, mes DESC LIMIT 10;
